name: Artemisinin
description: Artemisinin has been used in trials studying the treatment of Schizophrenia, Malaria, Falciparum, and Plasmodium Falciparum.

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Vemurafenib is combined with Artemisinin.

interactions.name: Artemether
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Artemisinin is combined with Artemether.

interactions.name: Lumefantrine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Artemisinin is combined with Lumefantrine.

interactions.name: Dapsone
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Artemisinin is combined with Dapsone.

interactions.name: Prochlorperazine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Prochlorperazine can be increased when it is combined with Artemisinin.
